description: Sync Jira issues, projects, boards, sprints, and users into the Shielva knowledge base via the Atlassian REST API v3 and Agile API v1.

install_fields.label: Atlassian Account Email
install_fields.help: The email address of your Atlassian account used to generate the API token.

install_fields.label: API Token
install_fields.help: Generate at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. Used as the HTTP Basic Auth password.

install_fields.label: Jira Domain (e.g. company.atlassian.net)
install_fields.help: Your full Jira Cloud domain, e.g. yourcompany.atlassian.net.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate email/api_token/domain by calling GET /myself. Returns HEALTHY + CONNECTED on success.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /myself and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with displayName in message.

methods.name: Sync Issues & Projects
methods.description: Full sync of all Jira projects and issues with startAt pagination.

methods.name: List Projects
methods.description: Return a list of project dicts from GET /rest/api/3/project/search.

methods.name: Search Issues
methods.description: Return a list of issue dicts from POST /rest/api/3/search with custom JQL.

methods.name: Get Issue
methods.description: Retrieve a single issue by key from GET /rest/api/3/issue/{issue_key}.

methods.name: List Boards
methods.description: Return a list of board dicts from GET /rest/agile/1.0/board.

methods.name: List Sprints
methods.description: Return a list of sprint dicts for a board from GET /rest/agile/1.0/board/{board_id}/sprint.

methods.name: List Users
methods.description: Return a list of user dicts from GET /rest/api/3/users/search.
